summary: Commercial Engine v2.0 testing complete. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: 2 tariffs (Starter 499 EUR/Mo, Growth 1.299 EUR/Mo) with correct pricing, 30% upfront, 24-month contracts. Admin Commercial Dashboard shows quotes/invoices tables, stats cards, and quote creation form. PDF generation works. Revolut webhook is idempotent. FAQ shows 15 entries with tariff info.
passed_tests: Starter tariff pricing: 499 EUR/mo, 11976 EUR total, 3592.80 EUR upfront ✓
Growth tariff pricing: 1299 EUR/mo, 31176 EUR total, 9352.80 EUR upfront ✓
Tariffs include company info (NeXify Automate, NeXifyAI) ✓
POST /api/admin/login — successful login returns JWT token ✓
POST /api/admin/quotes — creates starter quote with correct calculation ✓
POST /api/admin/quotes — creates growth quote with correct calculation ✓
Frontend: /de pricing section shows 2 tariffs with correct prices ✓
Frontend: /de FAQ section shows updated questions about tariffs ✓
Frontend: /admin Commercial tab shows quotes and invoices tables ✓
Frontend: Quote form shows correct tier options ✓

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

test_credentials.note: Password stored in backend/.env as ADMIN_PASSWORD

seed_data_creation: Test quotes created during testing (prefixed with TEST_Commercial, TEST_PDF, TEST_Send, TEST_Detail)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commercial Engine v2.0 fully tested. All pricing values verified: Starter (499/mo, 11976 total, 3592.80 upfront) and Growth (1299/mo, 31176 total, 9352.80 upfront). Admin Commercial tab working with quotes/invoices tables. PDF generation works. Revolut webhook is idempotent. FAQ has 15 entries. Cookie banner must be dismissed first when testing frontend.

mocked_apis_list: Revolut Merchant API — keys are test placeholders, orders will fail gracefully with bank_transfer fallback
mocked_apis.note: Revolut API returns fallback response as expected with test keys

features_verified.tariffs_api: GET /api/product/tariffs returns 2 active tariffs with correct pricing
features_verified.faq_api: GET /api/product/faq returns 15 FAQ entries derived from TARIFF_CONFIG
features_verified.quote_crud: Create, list, get detail, send quote all working
features_verified.pdf_generation: Quote PDF downloads with correct content-type and magic bytes
features_verified.commercial_stats: Dashboard stats endpoint returns quotes/invoices/revenue data
features_verified.frontend_pricing: 2 plans displayed with correct prices (499, 1.299 EUR/Mo)
features_verified.admin_commercial: Commercial tab with quotes/invoices tables and create form
